patches.hypothesis: The refined fix addresses overfitting by improving the robustness of the method to handle edge cases, avoiding hardcoded values, and ensuring general correctness.
patches.original_hypothesis: The issue occurs when the input string contains a character with ASCII value greater than 127, resulting in an ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when accessing the codes array. The fix involves checking if the ASCII value is greater than 127 and handling it appropriately.
